title: Pan-Seared Fatty Italian Cured Meat
description: A simple yet flavorful dish featuring a fatty italian cured meat pan-seared to perfection.
instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Slice the prosciutto into thin strips.
Season the prosciutto with salt to taste.
Add a small amount of oil to the preheated skillet.
Add the prosciutto strips to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the prosciutto from the skillet and let it rest for a few minutes.
Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the prosciutto.
